subcodes.first_line: O God, Thou Who illuminest the faces of the steadfast with the splendors of supreme constancy, and expandest the breasts of them that are firm through the breathings of holiness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا منور وجوه الثابتین بانوار الاستقامه الکبری و شارح الصدور الراسخین بنفحات القدس
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @firmness in the Covenant, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
